sandbox_note: Linux sandbox has known NTFS mount truncation in apps/monitor/config.py (7395 bytes, same issue as REVIEW-009c). G-2 ran in sandbox. G-1/G-3/G-4/G-5 verified via code analysis (line-number + pattern scan in sandbox). Windows execution recommended for full integration test.

gates.name: dry_run exits before load_channel_secrets()
gates.note: discord.py lines 31-42: if channel.dry_run returns ChannelResult immediately. load_channel_secrets() call at line 44 is never reached.

gates.name: webhook URL redaction
gates.note: redaction.py regex pattern matches both discord.com and discordapp.com webhook URLs. Verified in sandbox.

gates.name: no secret in ChannelResult output
gates.note: discord.py lines 32-42: dry_run ChannelResult has no webhook_url field. endpoint is always redacted_discord_endpoint() constant.

gates.name: safety scan: no order endpoint imports
triple dry_run gate: force_dry_run + live_alerts=False
gates.gate_expression: True if force_dry_run or not live_alerts else discord_channel.dry_run
gates.note: With force_dry_run=True (default), short-circuit ensures alert_dry_run=True regardless of channel.dry_run value.

secret_source_analysis.mechanism: env var MONITOR_DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL or configs/monitor_secrets.local.yaml discord.webhook_url

vps_config_instructions.step_2: Confirm configs/monitor.yaml has dry_run: true for discord channel
vps_config_instructions.step_5: Do NOT set dry_run: false until Rick explicitly authorizes real alert send
